subcodes.first_line: My spirit and my essence are a sacrifice unto Thee! Thy missive, adorned with the ink of loving-kindness, which verily is the cause and source [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی و ذاتی لک الفداء دستخط مطرزه بمداد وداد که فی الحقیقه علت و سبب و ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
